chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-504 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Mr. Waheed Ahmed Awan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G for the State a/w SIP Nisar Ahmed. ***************************************** The Petitioner through this Petition prays for legal protection. The Petitioner complaints that his sister namely Mst. Nargis married with Respondent No.11 in the year, 2012 and due to greedy nature of Respondent No.11, his sister filed Family Suit for maintenance and subsequently for dissolution of marriage before Family Court at Mirpurkhas and marriage was dissolved by way of Khulla as per Judgment and Decree dated 24.08.2023. He further submits that the private respondents are issuing threats to the Petitioner as well as his sister Mst. Nargis, who are very influential persons. Learned A.P.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioner, as and when approached. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect proceedings already pending against the Petitioners before the competent Court(s) of law. JUDGE Ali.
